programme.sub-title: Kid + Plane + Cable + Truck

programme.sub-title: Windmill + Acetone + Celluloid + Firing Pin
programme.desc: As MacGyver works quickly to rescue survivors from a collapsed building in Germany, he discovers a new safety threat -- an undetonated bomb from World War II is hidden beneath the rubble.

programme.sub-title: Soccer + Desi + Merchant + Titan

programme.title: The Longest Drive
programme.desc: To save an old friend's ranch, the Beaudine brothers round up a gang of misfits to drive a huge herd to market. Join the epic action when a stableman, a retired gunslinger, a dried-out drunk and two sneaky rustlers, hit the dusty trail.

programme.title: Kill Squad
programme.desc: Squad of martial arts masters follow a trail of violence and bloodshed to a vengeful, deadly battle of skills.

programme.title: Zulu
programme.desc: Outnumbered British soldiers do battle with Zulu warriors at Rorke's Drift.

programme.title: A Minute to Pray, A Second to Die
programme.desc: In Tuscosa, New Mexico, the Governor offers amnesty papers to all outlaws but gunfighter Clay McCord's appearance triggers a violent confrontation between the local marshal, McCord, and other outlaws.

programme.title: The Glass House
programme.desc: After the parents of Ruby (Leelee Sobieski) and her younger brother, Rhett (Trevor Morgan), are killed in a car crash, their parents' best friends, Erin and Terry Glass (Diane Lane, Stellan Skarsgard), become their guardians. The children hear promises of a world of opulence and California fun -- all they have to do is move into the Glasses' gated house. Before very long, though, Ruby suspects that Erin and Terry may not be the ideal guardians they seemed to be.

programme.title: Race For The Yankee Zephyr
programme.desc: In a lake high in the mountains of New Zealand, hunter Gibbie Gibson discovers a plane wreck from WW II.
